title: Affirm (AFRM) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text:
Affirm (AFRM) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Summary

Key Financial Metrics

The earnings call took place on May 8, 2024, covering Affirm's Q3 fiscal 2024 results (period ending March 31, 2024). The company reported strong performance with GMV growth of 36%, significantly exceeding guidance expectations.

Key Highlights

Revenue & Growth Performance:
Management noted robust revenue growth driven by successful pricing initiatives. CEO Max Levchin stated the company had "another excellent quarter" with expansion across multiple business segments.

Affirm Card Progress:
The Affirm card product showed impressive momentum with approximately 1 million cards distributed. Recent cohorts demonstrated higher engagement than early adopters, with "pay now" usage climbing from 6% to nearly 10% quarter-over-quarter.

Forward Guidance:
For Q4 fiscal 2024, Affirm projected adjusted operating margins between 15-17%, reflecting ongoing operating leverage while maintaining growth investments. The company guided for approximately 25% GMV growth in the subsequent quarter.

Credit & Underwriting:
Management emphasized that credit standards remain independently managed and are not coupled with growth objectives. The company continues prioritizing risk management while deploying capital strategically.

International Expansion:
Affirm confirmed plans to launch in the United Kingdom later in 2024, with management noting that credit models should transfer effectively across Western democracies sharing similar credit infrastructure.
